title: A school camping trip
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last summer, our class went on a camping trip in the mountains. We travelled there by bus and stayed in tents beside a lake surrounded (27) trees. During the day, we went hiking and learned how to cook meals outdoors. One afternoon, our instructor showed us how to light a fire safely without using matches. I found the activity harder (28) I had expected because the wood was wet after heavy rain. In the evenings, we sat around the fire telling stories and listening (29) music. Although the weather was cold at night, everyone enjoyed the experience. My teacher said the trip was useful (30) helping students become more independent. Before returning home, we worked together to clean the campsite and collect all the rubbish. I felt proud (31) our group because everyone had worked hard throughout the week. It was definitely one of the most exciting experiences I have had (32) a long time.
